tool.name: OGS: CreateAnchors
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'CreateAnchors'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for #for $m in $json_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for createanchors #for $m in $input: --input "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for #for $m in $json_file: --json-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --tolerance '$tolerance' --max-iter '$max_iter' --output output_1.vtu

param.name: json_file
param.label: json file
param.help: Input (.json) JSON file containing anchor start and end points

param.name: max_iter
param.label: max iter
param.help: maximum number of iterations of the internal root-finding algorithm, (min = 0)

tool.help: This tool runs the **CreateAnchors** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
